title: Tom Kerrigan
text: Home * People * Tom Kerrigan Tom Kerrigan, creator of tChess [1] Thomas C. (Tom) Kerrigan , an American software developer and computer chess programmer, who already got hooked on computer chess as a 13-year-old growing up in Fort Collins, Colorado , playing the Chessmaster on a friend's PC [2] . Inspired by the 1978 articles by Peter W. Frey and Larry Atkin on Chess 0.5 in BYTE magazine [3] , he started the development his chess program Stobor in 1993, and further wrote the didactic open source chess program TSCP [4] . While still focusing on Stobor and its parallel search , Tom Kerrigan's recent project is tChess , a chess program for the iPhone and iPod touch [5] Contents 1 Forum Posts 1.1 1997 ... 1.2 2000 ... 1.3 2015 ... 2 External Links 3 References Forum Posts [ edit ] 1997 ...
